query: SELECT standardCode, standardName, category FROM gs1_standards ORDER BY standardCode
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT standardCode, standardName, category FROM gs1_standards ORDER BY standardCode
stdout:
standardCode	standardName	category
EANCOM	EANCOM EDI Messages	Data Exchange
EPCIS	Electronic Product Code Information Services	Data Sharing
GS1-128	GS1-128 Barcode	Identification
GS1-BARCODES	GS1 2D Barcodes (QR, DataMatrix)	Identification
GS1-DPP	GS1 Digital Product Passport	Digital Products
GS1-TRACEABILITY	GS1 Traceability Standard	Traceability
GS1-XML	GS1 XML Standard	Data Exchange
GTIN	Global Trade Item Number	Identification
